overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red jacket navigating a neon-lit urban street in Japantown. The character crosses a wet intersection, passes through a covered pedestrian corridor lined with glowing storefronts, and emerges into another commercial intersection with massive digital billboards overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: black sedan drives past on the wet street from right to left
character begins moving forward to cross the street

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner observing traffic before crossing

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past the crosswalk on the wet road

entered.detail: tall commercial building with large NOACHI signage and circular neon light patterns
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning the street
trees with pink blossoms visible against the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a cyberpunk street corner with the NOACHI building visible across the wet intersection. The character waits as a black sedan passes by, then begins to move toward the yellow crosswalk. Cherry blossom trees and an elevated overpass are visible in the background under an overcast dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath building overpass

events.description: character crosses from open street into covered walkway area
entering darker covered section with red neon accent lighting

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk and entering a covered pedestrian passage beneath a concrete building

notable_agents.action: person in blue outfit crossing the street toward the camera

entered.detail: multi-level concrete building with yellow trim and red neon signage
large accumulation of garbage bags against the building wall
tunnel-like pedestrian passage with overhead concrete cover

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wet street and enters a covered walkway beneath a concrete building. The environment shifts from open sky to a sheltered corridor with red neon lights. The character passes a pile of trash bags and approaches the darker tunnel section ahead.

events.description: passing illuminated storefront with purple AOBA vertical signage
red sports car drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor past various neon-lit shops and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in black outfit walking while looking at her phone

entered.detail: vertical purple and white illuminated sign with AOBA text
circular green neon sign indicating open business
large illuminated windows with anime-style advertisements and graphics
rain-slicked concrete surface reflecting colorful neon lights

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered neon corridor, the character passes various storefronts including one with a prominent AOBA sign and another with a green OPEN neon sign. The wet sidewalk reflects the vibrant neon colors. Other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and a red sports car passes by on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with towering digital billboards

events.description: exiting covered corridor into open intersection with large digital displays
blue sedan drives through the crosswalk ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor and emerging into a larger intersection with massive overhead digital billboards

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving through the intersection crosswalk

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements high above the street
open crossroads with multiple lanes and traffic signals
green triangular awning with bright neon trim

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a major intersection dominated by massive digital billboards overhead. The environment opens up to reveal more of the cyberpunk cityscape with towering advertisements. A blue sedan drives past as the character approaches the next crosswalk, with neon-lit storefronts lining the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban district, transitioning from an open street corner into a sheltered corridor before emerging into a massive commercial intersection. It begins at a wet intersection near the NOACHI building, where the character waits for a black sedan to pass before crossing toward a concrete overpass under an overcast dusk sky. As the character moves forward, the open environment shifts into a covered walkway, where the lighting turns to red neon and the path narrows past piles of trash bags. The scene then flows through this vibrant corridor, passing the AOBA and OPEN signs while the wet pavement reflects the surrounding glow and pedestrians pass in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera emerges from the shelter into a wide-open cityscape dominated by towering digital billboards and flashing advertisements as a blue sedan drives past.
